subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-24 in London
subcodes.first_line: God made manifest the True Shepherd to gather together all His flocks, and that kind Shepherd was Baha'u'llah
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند راعی حقیقی را ظاهر فرمود تا جمیع اغنام را جمع فرماید و آن شبان مهربان
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @suffering and imprisonment
